package rulefixtures

// scenario for sync_mutex_for_readonly_config: `mu.RLock(); v := config.X; mu.RUnlock()` for read-mostly config that changes rarely
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule676NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario676Negative(records []Rule676NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
